programs.title: Dropped: Project Yukon: Hell Has a Name
programs.desc: As season two begins, highlighting the journeys to Base Camp and to sheep camp.

programs.title: Fight to Survive: Ken Henderson Story
programs.desc: Best friends Ed Cohen and Ken Henderson set out for two days of Texas gulf fishing, but tragedy strikes and the two men get stranded adrift in hostile waters.

programs.title: Danger Decoded
programs.desc: Disaster looms at the Isle of Man Tourist Trophy Races  a shocking natural occurrence in Italy  a corkscrew twist at a Californian air show.

programs.title: Danger Decoded
programs.desc: Catching another collection of on-camera calamities, featuring rally cars speeding along Italian roads, and a terrifying dust devil that's out of control.

programs.title: Air Rescue
programs.desc: The Westpac Crew help a nine-month-old baby who has been burned with boiling water, and a runaway vehicle filled with children drives towards a ravine.

programs.title: Air Rescue
programs.desc: Following the Westpac Rescue crew as they respond to a shark attack victim, a fisherman caught in a risky spot and an elderly man with chest pain.
